Strategy rationale
- Reduce concentration risk in NVDA (28.7% weight) and move the “Big 5” (NVDA/MSFT/AAPL/GOOG/AMZN) closer to equal-weight while modestly increasing cash flexibility.

- Bought AMZN 1 share
- Bought GOOG 1 share
